behavior: Case files keep daily job-search evidence and actions local, reviewable, and useful offline.
revision_scope: The committed Milestone 6 opportunity case, daily mission, evidence wall, preparation, debrief, reviewed native file drops, protected-answer controls, first-run choices, and workflow-state coverage through 48a47eaf.
platform: local macOS arm64 host; browser layout checks used Chromium at 1440 by 1000 and 390 by 844

commands.relevant_result: All 34 focused tests passed for reviewed setup, session-only skip, retained-choice retry, startup recovery precedence, and bounded case rendering.
commands.caveat: Renderer tests use typed command doubles; Rust command and storage behavior is covered by focused owner tests and the prior Milestone 6 checkpoints.

commands.relevant_result: All four first-run Chromium journeys passed at desktop and narrow widths, including completion, session-only skip, useful local import access, and no horizontal overflow.
commands.caveat: The browser runtime is deterministic and does not contact live job sources.

commands.relevant_result: All 12 Chromium journeys passed for empty, partial, duplicate, offline, failed-source, and restored-data case states at desktop and narrow widths.
commands.caveat: Controlled case snapshots prove renderer behavior and layout; Rust aggregation and sanitization remain covered by their focused owner tests.

commands.relevant_result: The reviewed setup reused the owned database, persisted exact settings, and made the saved configuration non-first-run on restart.
commands.caveat: The test uses isolated temporary paths and an in-memory SQLite database.

commands.relevant_result: The ordinary-screening regression passed, including Care Coordinator as a civilian occupation and military experience, work authorization, clearance, age, and religious studies as reviewable factual questions.
commands.caveat: The focused classifier test does not replace the broader protected-answer checkpoint suites.

commands.command: npm run lint; npm run typecheck; npm run lint:file-size; npm run lint:architecture; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Frontend lint and types, every hard file limit, architecture contracts, and patch whitespace passed after the focused first-run test split.
commands.caveat: Focused verification was used instead of full frontend, browser, and Rust workspace suites.

commands.relevant_result: Canonical state passed with revision-bound Milestone 6 evidence and Milestone 7 as the sole active feature.
commands.caveat: Static repository checks do not replace installed application or release-platform proof.

commands.relevant_result: Maintained documentation, links, prose, and planning markers passed.
commands.caveat: Documentation checks do not prove runtime behavior.

commands.relevant_result: All 852 repository and cross-platform script contract tests passed.
commands.caveat: Script contracts do not replace installed application or release-platform proof.

commands.command: Fresh read-only adversarial Milestone 6 completion review
commands.relevant_result: The final verdict was SOUND after the session-only skip disclosure was made explicit and regression-protected.
commands.caveat: The review preserves installed platform and release-wide proof for their later milestone owners.

completion.first_run: Plain-language setup persists reviewed search settings, keeps sources and alerts opt-in, provides a disclosed session-only skip, preserves choices after a failed save, and exposes a local import path without starting hidden source work.
completion.case_file: One bounded local snapshot presents job, source, risk, evidence and packet counts, application and contact presence, interviews, offer, outcome, decision, preparation, and sanitized timeline state.
completion.daily_workflow: The deterministic mission board, evidence wall, why-not explanation, preparation workup, and post-interview debrief reuse focused existing owners without hidden writes, sends, AI, source refresh, status changes, or submission.
completion.native_drop: Rust-owned reviewed drops route resumes, UTF-8 job postings, and encrypted backups to their existing review owners without exposing source paths or acting automatically.
completion.protected_answers: Voluntary or sensitive personal answers stay explicit, local, and manual-only across lookup, suggestion, preview, and live-form preparation. Care Coordinator remains an ordinary civilian occupation.
completion.state_matrix: Empty, partial, duplicate, offline, failed-source, and restored-data states remain usable at desktop and narrow widths.

red_green.initial_red: Focused tests failed for absent skip, retry, duplicate, risk, contact, and completed-interview behavior.
red_green.review_red: Fresh combined browser verification exposed an incorrect empty-dashboard button assertion, and the adversarial pass exposed ambiguous session-only skip copy.
red_green.green: The corrected local Import Job assertion and explicit session-only disclosure passed their focused UI and browser regressions.

retained_gaps.gap: Source-pack quarantine, signature verification, installation, lifecycle, and drop completion are not part of Milestone 6.
The edition and model first-run doctor remains unimplemented.

Exact Windows 11 and macOS 26 installed journeys, live native drop behavior, and release-wide platform proof remain unverified; Windows reparse handling is source-reviewed but was not live-run on this macOS host.
